title: Fox Refreshed
body:
This resource pack revamps the look of foxes to make them cuter, more detailed, and full of personality—all while staying true to the game's blocky charm.

**This pack features:**

**Enhanced Fox Textures**: detailed designs that elevate the look of foxes while staying true to the vanilla aesthetic.

**Fresh animations version:** [Fox Refreshed:FA](https://modrinth.com/project/fox-refreshedfa)

[entity-model-features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) **required!**

![Foxes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32b9aec01b8b0ad324a998af84ab8f2329614120.png)
